last_action.outcome: T-031 (autonomous model routing optimisation) is delivered 2026-07-14. The PowerShell 5.1+ supervisor at tools/ai-session-router.ps1 drives one bounded Claude Code child session per phase, each on a different configured cloud model. The supervisor reads .ai/model-routing.json (high/standard/economy/review/fallback profiles; standard and economy are CONFIGURE_ME until the user runs -Command Configure), classifies the work via .ai/model-classification.json, and launches each phase through the non-interactive `ollama launch claude --model <model> -y -- -p "<prompt>"` form. The supervisor writes a phase receipt at .ai/receipts/phases/<task-id>-<phase>.json for every phase. The supervisor stops at closeout; the user must invoke Next again to begin the next task. The future in-platform Blazor IAiSessionRouter is backlog only. The T-031 task does not push, does not begin T-030, does not modify application source code, and does not change the AGENTS.md rules. The next session is the M4-C closeout (T-030) on the user Approve or Next invocation.

intended_next_action: Stop. The next session is the M4-C closeout (T-030) on the user's 'Approve' or 'Next' invocation. The T-031 task is a one-time session-efficiency task; the supervisor is a developer-tooling bridge that exists today; the future in-platform Blazor AI Session Router is backlog only (see .ai/backlog/ai-session-router.md and DECISIONS.md ADR-017).
session_notes: T-031 autonomous model routing optimisation (2026-07-14). One-time session-efficiency task. Ships the operating-layer AI session router (a Windows-first PowerShell 5.1+ supervisor at tools/ai-session-router.ps1) that drives one bounded Claude Code child session per phase, each on a different configured cloud model. The supervisor is the only place that decides which model performs which phase. The supervisor never hot-swaps a running Claude Code process. The supervisor never begins a second task. The supervisor stops at closeout. Configuration lives in .ai/model-routing.json (validated by .ai/model-routing.schema.json). Classification lives in .ai/model-classification.json (mirrored in .ai/model-classification.md). Per-phase prompts live in .ai/prompts/phases/. Phase receipts live in .ai/receipts/phases/ (schema at .ai/templates/phase-receipt.schema.json). The implementation receipt lives at .ai/receipts/<task-id>.json (schema at .ai/templates/implementation-receipt.schema.json). The future in-platform Blazor feature (IAiSessionRouter, IModelRoutingPolicy, IAgentSessionLauncher, ModelRoutingConfiguration, TaskExecutionPipeline) is backlog only. The T-031 task does not begin T-030 (M4-C closeout), does not begin M4-D, and does not modify application source code.
